entries.feedback_text:
Just a quick run while I could grab 30 mins before heading to the conference, I did it quite simple
1km chilled 
1km comfortable
1km controlled
1km upper controlled 
everything felt really good and emembered ot bring gloves to keep my hands warm 
hard to comapre against anything else, cold which is not the norm for me , and unliek nearly all my runs at home this was climbing out and downhill back so the complete opposite of what i am used to .
entries.headline: Wigan Running — 4.02 km in 28:00 — avg HR 128 / max 146
